title: Bright Sunset
caption: Sun bright as it starts to set.

title: Bright Sun with Cars
caption: Parking at a premium for this view.

title: Sun with a Palm
caption: Palm taking in the sun.

title: Blue sky and Beach goers
caption: Beautiful views for the beachgoers.

title: The Best View
caption: The best Grille Mark.

title: The Ladies
caption: What a great group.

title: Ladies with a Sunset
caption: Happy ladies.

title: Great Sunset
caption: Until next time.

title: Looking Out Over the Beach
caption: Two visitors lean over a sun-warmed railing to take in the Gulf view, palm trees framing the busy shore on a bright March day.

title: Cocktails at the Beach Bar
caption: Two friends raise their umbrella drinks at a colorful beach bar, perfectly in the Pass-a-Grille spirit of a sunny afternoon.

title: Watching the Bay from the Dock
caption: A quiet moment on the dock as the turquoise bay and billowing clouds stretch all the way to the horizon.

title: Sunrise Over the Dock
caption: A weathered dock stretches into the still bay as the sun rises over the treeline, casting a golden path across the water.

title: Morning Shadows on the Jetty
caption: Long morning shadows trail behind two visitors as they walk the rocky jetty toward the open Gulf.

title: Parakeet in the Treetops
caption: A lone monk parakeet surveys the neighborhood from the top of a seaside shrub, its green plumage vivid against the blue sky.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 9
caption: A woman relaxes on a lounge chair in the warm evening light, a Stanley cup and a red solo cup close at hand.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 10
caption: The evening sun hangs low over a calm Gulf horizon, casting a bright silver path across the water as a palm frond peeks in from the corner.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 11
caption: A couple unwind on lounge chairs as the evening sun warms the deck, colorful buildings and palms filling the background.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 12
caption: A lone palm stands in sharp silhouette against a glowing golden sky as the sun nears the Gulf.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 13
caption: Pastel storefronts and palms along the waterfront glow in the angled evening light.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 14
caption: A small boat makes its way across the shimmering Gulf as the evening sun melts toward the horizon.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 15
caption: A single palm tree stands against a pale evening sky, the Gulf stretching wide behind it with a tiny boat just visible on the horizon.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 16
caption: Two friends grinning in the warm evening light, one proudly wearing her Salty People cap.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 17
caption: Caught mid-story, a woman glows in the last amber light of the evening on the deck.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 18
caption: A deep orange sunset burns across the Gulf horizon, the sky and sea both lit from end to end.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 19
caption: Wrapped in a purple jacket and cat-eye shades, she takes in the last warm glow of the evening sun.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 20
caption: A cocktail in hand and crab earrings on, she's dressed for a proper Gulf Coast evening.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 21
caption: The sun sits just above the Gulf horizon, painting the sky and water in deep layers of orange and amber.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 22
caption: Two silhouettes sit together at the water's edge, watching the sun make its final descent into the Gulf.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 23
caption: The last sliver of sun disappears below the Gulf horizon, leaving the sky washed in pink and deep orange.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 24
caption: Two figures silhouetted against the final glow of sunset, the Gulf stretching out before them in warm amber tones.

title: Pass A Grille March 26 25
caption: Fishermen and beachgoers linger on the sand as the last sliver of sun drops behind the Gulf, the sky fading from orange to violet.

title: Grackle on Warning Sign
caption: A grackle claims the high point of a warning sign while morning light catches the marsh grasses and calm bay at Pass-a-Grille.

title: Bird Over Morning Dunes
caption: A bird takes flight over coastal homes and scrubby dunes as the morning sun rises above the barrier island horizon.

title: Parakeets Among Wildflowers
caption: Monk parakeets forage among clusters of yellow beach wildflowers blooming across the white sand dunes of Pass-a-Grille.

title: Parakeets in a Palm
caption: Two monk parakeets cling to the rough bark of a seaside palm, part of the colorful feral flocks that have made Pass-a-Grille their home.

title: Morning Shadow on the Dunes
caption: A morning kiss casts a long shadow across the dunes of Pass-a-Grille, the Gulf glinting just beyond the ridge of sea oats.

title: Historic Pass-A-Grille Sign
caption: The ornate street sign of Historic Pass-A-Grille Way stands against a cloudless morning sky, marking the entrance to one of Florida's oldest beach communities.

title: Pelican on Dock Piling
caption: A brown pelican stands guard on a weathered dock piling, the calm bay and distant condominiums stretching behind it in the soft morning light.

title: Pier Ruins at Morning Light
caption: Pelicans perch in silhouette along the ruins of an old pier as the morning sun blazes a trail of light across the still bay.

title: Pelicans on the Old Pier
caption: The remains of an old pier reach into the shimmering bay, its pilings claimed by a colony of pelicans on a bright March morning.

title: Macaw Mural, Gulfport
caption: A vivid street mural of macaws adorns the side of a light blue building in Gulfport's arts district, bringing the tropics to life on a sunny afternoon.

title: Sculpture at Gulfport Public Library
caption: A rusty kinetic sculpture of gears and a rising sun stands outside the Gulfport Public Library, one of the small city's many unexpected artistic touches.

title: Moon and Tide
caption: Caught between day and night, the moon rose over the water as the horizon still glowed.

title: Gulf Glow
caption: That last moment before the sun slips below the water. You can't plan for it — you just have to be there.

title: Front Row Seats
caption: The beach fills up every evening for the same show. Nobody minds.

title: Welcome Home
caption: On the beautiful Gulf of Mexico. The sign means it.

title: Blue Sky, Better Company
caption: The Gulf put on a perfect backdrop. They didn't need any help.

title: Best Seats in the House
caption: The whole crew, the whole sky, not a care anywhere.

title: The Way Through
caption: Stone path, salt air, palm shade. There are worse ways to spend an afternoon.

title: Peak Sunshine
caption: The Gulf is somewhere in those eyes. They knew exactly where they were.

title: Palm Silhouette
caption: One palm tree. One perfect hour. The Gulf did the rest.

title: Passing Through
caption: A whole world on the move, seen from the shore. It doesn't stop.

title: Feet Up, Gulf Out
caption: A visitor kicks back on a sun-drenched balcony, feet propped on the railing and a coffee mug close at hand, as the turquoise Gulf stretches out to the horizon on a brilliant late morning.

title: Dinner at Red White & Booze
caption: Four friends gather under the glowing sign of Red, White & Booze, all smiles after a night of fresh fish and live music dockside at Pass-a-Grille.

title: Alone on the Brick Street
caption: A woman sits cross-legged on the cobblestone of Historic Pass-a-Grille at night, string lights twinkling overhead as the quiet street stretches into the dark behind her.

title: Night Out on Historic Pass-a-Grille
caption: A couple pauses for a selfie on the brick-paved street of the historic district, the warm glow of string lights and storefronts framing a perfect night out.

title: Happy Hour at Reef Donkey
caption: Two people beam under the Reef Donkey neon sign, pool tables glowing green behind them in this beloved Pass-a-Grille dive bar.

title: Keystone Motel Mural at Night
caption: The vintage mural on the Keystone Motel — Est. 1945 — glows in the night light, its polka-dotted pin-up figure declaring that Pass-a-Grille has been laid back since way back.

title: Stars Over the Beach Lot
caption: Stars emerge above Pass-a-Grille's beachfront parking lot, the warm amber glow of sodium lights painting the palms and parked cars while the Gulf waits just beyond the dunes.
